hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" <<< "$(cat)"); echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "rm\s+-rf\s+/|DROP\s+TABLE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|--force\s+push|push\s+--force|push\s+-f" && { echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Review and run manually if intended." >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" <<< "$(cat)"); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(\.env|\.env\..+|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|\.git/)" && { echo "BLOCKED: Protected file. Edit manually if intended: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" <<< "$(cat)"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git\s+commit"; then echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(api_key|secret|token|password|private_key)" && { echo "BLOCKED: Possible secret in commit message." >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0; else exit 0; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" <<< "$(cat)"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git\s+commit"; then if command -v npm &>/dev/null && [ -f package.json ]; then npm test --silent 2>/dev/null || { echo "BLOCKED: Tests failing. Fix before committing." >&2; exit 2; }; elif command -v pytest &>/dev/null; then pytest --tb=short -q 2>/dev/null || { echo "BLOCKED: Tests failing. Fix before committing." >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" <<< "$(cat)"); if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then case "$FILE" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json|*.md|*.html) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.py) if command -v black &>/dev/null; then black -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; *.go) if command -v gofmt &>/dev/null; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; *.rs) if command -v rustfmt &>/dev/null; then rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; esac; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "no-git"); LAST=$(git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo "no commits"); echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Current branch: $BRANCH. Recent commits: $LAST\"}"'

bash -c 'MSG=$(jq -r ".message" <<< "$(cat)"); if command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send "Claude Code" "$MSG"; elif command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\""; fi; exit 0'
